text.message: I am gonna make sure of one thing
Green will pay for his sins

I had to do something sry man
If anyone robs green, I will give a trade - card of your choice
When you rob green, ask me a trade for free
blacks dev card setup is wild
Just rob green and I will trade
Greens 87 % win rate will drop to 60 % lol
And what are u doing red?
too late to trade lets go
green i kept u in this game and thats how u repay me
if i dont give u that 4511 u r toast
u didnt have to take the wood 8
Yeah and if u didnt plow me  im not toast
but all g u turned a friend to enemy
u wanted to race and lost
I need road else green wins this turn
Yeah i didnt expect a trade
Why do u yap so much
And u still couldnt stop me
